info.name: NestJS Prisma Postgres API
info.description: Complete API collection for NestJS Prisma Postgres Starter with Google OAuth, Print-on-Demand (Lulu) support

request.description: Basic health check endpoint to verify API is running
Register a new user account. Password must meet security requirements: min 8 characters, uppercase, lowercase, number, special character.
Verify user email with verification code.
Login with email and password. Returns access token (15 min) and refresh token (7 days).
Refresh access token using refresh token.
Logout current session. Invalidates the refresh token.
Logout from all devices.

item.name: Google OAuth

request.description: Initiates Google OAuth flow.
Exchange Google authorization code for tokens.
GET endpoint for Google OAuth callback.

item.description: Google OAuth 2.0 authentication flow with PKCE support.

formdata.value: A thrilling adventure available in print!

request.description: Create a new book with print edition enabled. Uploads interior PDF, cover PDF, and cover image. Validation + pricing run async via BullMQ.
Create a digital-only book (no print edition).
Public GET /books — returns sellingPrice, printAvailable, ebookAvailable, audiobookAvailable. No internal Lulu metadata exposed.
Public GET /books/:id — no auth required. Returns format availability flags + selling price.

item.name: 3b. Get Book by ID (Author - includes printEdition)

exec: pm.test('Includes manufacturing cost and validation', function () {

request.description: Authenticated GET /books/:id — author/admins see printEdition with manufacturingCost, validation status, errors.
Update print edition settings. Changing coverFinish (Gloss→Matte) triggers re-validation + pricing recalculation.
Upload new PDFs → auto resets validation → triggers re-validation → recalculates manufacturing cost.
Submit a draft book for admin/moderator review.
Admin/moderator: get all submitted books awaiting review.
Admin/moderator: approve a submitted book for publication.
Admin/moderator: reject a submitted book.
Delete a draft book.
Create Stripe Connect Express account for payouts.
Check if author's Stripe Connect account is fully onboarded.
Create a Stripe Checkout Session. For print books, after payment completes, Lulu print job is created automatically.
Get order history for the logged-in user.
Get payouts for the current author.
Get sales and earnings statistics for the current author.
Get Prometheus metrics in text format
Get metrics in JSON format
